title: New ways to manage your data in ChatGPT
titleZh: 在ChatGPT中管理数据的新方法
summary: ChatGPT users can now turn off chat history, allowing you to choose which conversations can be used to train our models.
summaryZh: ChatGPT用户现在可以关闭聊天记录，让您选择可以使用哪些对话来训练我们的模型。
highlights: ChatGPT users can now turn off chat history, allowing you to choose which conversations can be used to train our models.
highlightsZh: ChatGPT用户现在可以关闭聊天记录，让您选择可以使用哪些对话来训练我们的模型。

title: Announcing OpenAI’s Bug Bounty Program
summary: This initiative is essential to our commitment to develop safe and advanced AI. As we create technology and services that are secure, reliable, and trustworthy, we need your help.
summaryZh: 这一举措对于我们致力于开发安全和先进的人工智能至关重要。在我们创建安全、可靠和值得信赖的技术和服务时，我们需要您的帮助。
highlights: This initiative is essential to our commitment to develop safe and advanced AI.
As we create technology and services that are secure, reliable, and trustworthy, we need your help.
highlightsZh: 这一举措对于我们致力于开发安全和先进的人工智能至关重要。在我们创建安全、可靠和值得信赖的技术和服务时，我们需要您的帮助。

title: Our approach to AI safety
titleZh: 我们的人工智能安全方法
summary: Ensuring that AI systems are built, deployed, and used safely is critical to our mission.
summaryZh: 确保人工智能系统的安全构建、部署和使用对我们的使命至关重要。
highlights: Ensuring that AI systems are built, deployed, and used safely is critical to our mission.
